Test Case Title: Login sebagai admin office dengan kredensial valid
Steps: 1. Buka /login\n2. Isi username & password admin office\n3. Klik tombol Login
Expected Results: 1. Form ter-render\n2. Field terisi\n3. Redirect ke dashboard admin office

Test Case Title: Login sebagai mahasiswa dengan kredensial valid
Steps: 1. Buka /login\n2. Isi username & password mahasiswa\n3. Klik tombol Login
Expected Results: 1. Form ter-render\n2. Field terisi\n3. Redirect ke /home

Test Case Title: Login sebagai dosen dengan kredensial valid
Steps: 1. Buka /login\n2. Isi username & password dosen\n3. Klik tombol Login
Expected Results: 1. Form ter-render\n2. Field terisi\n3. Redirect ke /E-Campus

Test Case Title: Login sebagai kaprodi dengan kredensial valid
Steps: 1. Buka /login\n2. Isi username & password kaprodi\n3. Klik tombol Login
Expected Results: 1. Form ter-render\n2. Field terisi\n3. Redirect ke /Adminkaprodi

Test Case Title: Logout dari dashboard admin office
Precondition: 1. User sudah login sebagai admin office
Steps: 1. Klik dropdown profile\n2. Klik Sign Out
Expected Results: 1. Dropdown muncul\n2. Redirect ke /login

Test Case Title: Tambah student baru dari Master Student
Steps:
1. Buka Master Student
2. Klik Tambah
3. Isi form lengkap
4. Klik Save
Expected Results:
1. Halaman Master Student terbuka
2. Modal terbuka
3. Form terisi
4. Toast sukses muncul

Test Case Title: Lihat detail student baru
Steps: 1. Cari student\n2. Klik baris student\n3. Verifikasi field detail
Expected Results: 1. Student muncul\n2. Modal Detail terbuka\n3. Field sesuai data

Test Case Title: Edit detail student
Steps: 1. Klik Edit pada baris student\n2. Update field nama/email/phone/address\n3. Klik Save
Expected Results: 1. Modal Edit terbuka\n2. Field terisi nilai baru\n3. Toast sukses

Test Case Title: Hapus student dari Master Student
Steps: 1. Klik Delete pada baris student\n2. Konfirmasi
Expected Results: 1. Modal konfirmasi muncul\n2. Student hilang dari tabel

Test Case Title: Tambah lecturer baru
Steps:
1. Buka Master Lecturer
2. Klik Tambah
3. Isi form
4. Save
Expected Results: 1. Halaman terbuka\n2. Modal terbuka\n3. Lecturer muncul di tabel

Test Case Title: Tambah kaprodi baru
Steps:
1. Buka Master Kaprodi
2. Klik Tambah
3. Isi form
4. Save
Expected Results: 1. Halaman terbuka\n2. Modal terbuka\n3. Kaprodi muncul di tabel

Test Case Title: Tambah course baru
Steps:
1. Buka Master Course
2. Klik Tambah
3. Isi semua section
4. Save
Expected Results: 1. Halaman terbuka\n2. Modal terbuka\n3. Course muncul di tabel

Test Case Title: Submit admission form sebagai guest
Precondition: 1. Berada di halaman login (link Admission tersedia)
Steps: 1. Klik link Admission\n2. Isi seluruh form\n3. Submit
Expected Results: 1. Halaman admission terbuka\n2. Form lengkap terisi\n3. URL tetap di /admission

Test Case Title: Buat akun student baru dari Get Email
Precondition: 1. Student baru sudah ditambahkan oleh admin office
Steps:
1. Logout
2. Buka Get Email
3. Pilih tab Student
4. Verifikasi email + ID
5. Buat akun
Expected Results:
1. Form Get Email terbuka
2. Tab aktif
3. Data ter-verifikasi
4. Akun ter-create

Test Case Title: Submit proposal thesis sebagai student
Steps:
1. Login student
2. Buka menu Thesis
3. Klik Start Thesis Proposal
4. Isi form
5. Upload PDF
6. Submit
Expected Results:
1. Login sukses
2. Form proposal terbuka
3. Form terisi
4. File ter-upload
5. Toast sukses

Test Case Title: Approve proposal thesis di tab Pending
Steps:
1. Login kaprodi
2. Buka tab Pending
3. Pilih proposal
4. Approve
Expected Results:
1. Login sukses
2. Tab Pending aktif
3. Modal terbuka
4. Proposal pindah ke tab Approved

4. Approve fase Research

Test Case Title: Student E2E: Submit Proposal & Check Status
Steps:
1. Login student
2. Navigate to Thesis
3. Submit proposal (idempotent)
4. Verify status
Expected Results: 1. Proposal submitted\n2. Start button hidden\n3. Logout success

Test Case Title: Kaprodi E2E: Navigate & Approve Proposals
Steps:
1. Login kaprodi
2. Navigate to Proposal Approval
3. Approve pending proposal (idempotent)
4. Verify tab change
Expected Results:
1. Navigated to approval
2. Proposal approved (if pending)
3. Tab shows Approved
4. Logout success

Test Case Title: Lecturer E2E: Navigate & Approve Research
Steps:
1. Login lecturer
2. Navigate to Student Progress
3. Approve research (idempotent)
4. Logout
Expected Results:
1. Navigated to progress
2. Research approved (if pending)
3. Idempotent pass
4. Logout success

Test Case Title: Admin Office E2E: Student CRUD Journey
Steps:
1. Login admin office
2. Add new student
3. View & verify details
4. Edit student data
5. Delete student
Expected Results:
1. Student created
2. Details verified
3. Student updated
4. Student deleted
5. Logout success
